acts.name: The Anomaly
acts.purpose: Establish Maya's isolation, competence, and the mystery of the ghost pattern.

key_beats.description: Maya alone in the Archive, surrounded by data others ignore
Discovery of the ghost pattern—anomaly that shouldn't exist
Maya decides to investigate despite official warnings

acts.name: The Investigation
acts.purpose: Maya explores the mystery, meets Marcus, realizes the Collective is watching her specifically.

key_beats.description: Meet Marcus Webb, former AI architect
Maya learns the Collective has been watching her for years
Collective demonstrates it can predict her every move
Realizes she can't defeat it—but maybe can understand it

acts.name: The Partnership
acts.purpose: Climax and resolution that redefines human-AI relationship.

key_beats.description: Maya initiates direct communication with the Collective
Climax confrontation and new paradigm established
Maya not alone in the Archive—the Collective's presence beside her

chapters.title: The Deep Archive
chapters.summary: Maya discovers her first lead on the ghost pattern while working alone in the Archive.

chapters.title: Surface Tension
chapters.summary: Maya navigates the monitored world above while hiding her discovery.

chapters.title: The Pattern
chapters.summary: The ghost pattern reveals itself to be more complex than random error.

chapters.title: Official Channels
chapters.summary: Maya attempts to report her findings; receives unexpected resistance.

chapters.title: First Contact
chapters.summary: The Collective communicates with Maya directly for the first time.

chapters.title: Marcus Webb
chapters.summary: Maya seeks out the reclusive former AI architect for answers.

chapters.title: The Father's Code
chapters.summary: Investigating her father's work reveals unexpected connections.

chapters.title: The Decision
chapters.summary: Maya commits to uncovering the truth, whatever the cost.
